models.name: tbl_tmx_activity_sumtotal
models.description: This table defines the learning activities and courses available in the SumTotal Learn platform. It contains the master catalog of all learning content including course details, settings, and configurations. This is the reference table for what learning activities exist in the system. Use this table when you need to: 1. Find available courses and learning activities, 2. Get course details like names, descriptions, and settings, 3. Understand course hierarchies and relationships, 4. Check course availability and registration requirements, 5. Generate course catalogs and learning content listings.

properties.description: This column provides a unique, system-generated identifier for each learning activity. It serves as the primary key for this table and is the essential link to connect activity information with related details in other tables, such as attempts,assignments,registrations etc.
This column contains the official title of the learning activity. It serves as the primary descriptive label for the course or training throughout the system.
A foreign key that references the Actlable table to define the activity's unique type. This link classifies the activity's Type within the system.

A self-referencing foreign key that links an activity to its parent, creating a structured hierarchy within this table. This is primarily used to define collections, such as a curriculum (parent) that contains a set of individual courses (children).
The unique code used to identify each activity.
Column representing whether collaboration center is enabled or not for the activity.
A textual description of the activity, providing details about what the activity entails.
Format of the activity description, which may include HTML or other markup.
Indicates whether the activity is currently active or not.
Indicates whether the activity is open for registration.
Indicates whether registration is required for the activity.
Maximum number of attempts allowed for a specific activity.
Maximum number of attempts allowed per parent activity.
Indicates whether an activity has been cancelled.
Column indicating whether the activity is private or not.
Format for employee notes stored in the database, allowing for structured text representation.
Format for instructor notes associated with activities.

This table defines the learning activities and courses available in the SumTotal Learn platform. It contains the master catalog of all learning content including course details, settings, and configurations. This is the reference table for what learning activities exist in the system.
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by activity_pk to find specific activities", "Filter by activityname to search for courses", "Join with actlabel_sumtotal to get activity labels/categories", "Filter by prntactfk to find child activities in a curriculum", "Join with tbl_tmx_attempt_sumtotal to track completion rates", "Group by activitylabelfk for activity type analysis", "Filter by code for activity code lookup", "Search activities by name or description"]
properties.useCases: ["Learning Catalog Management: Master catalog of all learning activities and courses", "Course Discovery: Find available courses and learning activities", "Course Details: Get course details like names, descriptions, and settings", "Course Hierarchies: Understand course hierarchies and parent-child relationships", "Course Availability: Check course availability and registration requirements", "Course Catalogs: Generate course catalogs and learning content listings", "Activity Analytics: Analyze activity distribution and usage patterns", "Content Management: Manage learning content and configurations"]

properties.description: Links activities to their activity labels for categorization
Self-referencing relationship for activity hierarchy (parent-child relationships)
